text:
🎉 StackChan Quick Start

StackChan is a super kawaii AI desktop robot co-created by M5Stack and the user community. It uses the M5Stack CoreS3 as its main controller, powered by an ESP32-S3 SoC featuring a 240 MHz dual-core processor, with 16MB Flash and 8MB PSRAM onboard, and https://t.co/dE3ZVMXzKx
